Build powerful forms and automate your w: Build powerful forms and automate your workflow with Deftform.
To get your Deftform API key:\n1. Log in:
To get your Deftform API key:
1. Log in to your Deftform workspace at https://deftform.com
2. Go to **Settings > API** (https://deftform.com/settings/api)
3. Click **Create API Key**
4. Copy the key and paste it here

Need help? See https://deftform.com/docs/api
Retrieves all information about your Def: Retrieves all information about your Deftform workspace. Useful as a connection test.
Lists all forms in your workspace, inclu: Lists all forms in your workspace, including their fields.
Retrieves only the fields of a specific: Retrieves only the fields of a specific form. Great for understanding the structure before building automations.
Retrieves all submissions (responses) fo: Retrieves all submissions (responses) for a specific form. Useful for reporting and data exports.
Generates a PDF download link for a spec: Generates a PDF download link for a specific form submission by its unique response UUID.
Submits a new response programmatically:
Submits a new response programmatically to a form. 
**Note:** This does **not** trigger email notifications to the form admin, unlike regular public submissions.
Updates any combination of form settings: Updates any combination of form settings via a single call — from title and status to integrations, SEO, and security.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint
The unique identifier of the submission. You can find this in the form responses list.
Key-value pairs where each key is the fi: Key-value pairs where each key is the field UUID and the value is the user input.
New display name of the form. Leave empt: New display name of the form. Leave empty to keep the current value.
New description shown on the public form: New description shown on the public form page.
When checked, the form stops accepting n: When checked, the form stops accepting new submissions.
Maximum number of submissions allowed. L: Maximum number of submissions allowed. Leave empty for unlimited responses.
Message shown on screen after the user s: Message shown on screen after the user submits the form.
URL to redirect the respondent to after: URL to redirect the respondent to after submission (instead of showing a message).
Number of seconds to wait before redirec: Number of seconds to wait before redirecting. Leave empty for instant redirect.
Text on the primary button shown after s: Text on the primary button shown after submission (e.g. "Download").
Text on the secondary button shown after: Text on the secondary button shown after submission (e.g. "Next").
Message shown when a user tries to acces: Message shown when a user tries to access a closed form.
Subject line of the email sent to admins: Subject line of the email sent to admins on each new submission.
Custom note added to the top of the admi: Custom note added to the top of the admin notification email.
Attach a PDF version of the submission t: Attach a PDF version of the submission to the admin email.
Include the full response data in the ad: Include the full response data in the admin notification body.
Message sent to the respondent in their: Message sent to the respondent in their confirmation email (if enabled).
Subject line of the confirmation email s: Subject line of the confirmation email sent to the respondent.
Custom HTML title tag for the public for: Custom HTML title tag for the public form page.
Meta description for the public form pag: Meta description for the public form page.
When checked, search engines may index t: When checked, search engines may index the public form page.
When checked, a notification is sent to: When checked, a notification is sent to the configured Discord channel on each submission.
When checked, a notification is sent to the configured Slack channel on each submission.
When checked, submissions are automatica: When checked, submissions are automatically synced to Google Sheets.
When checked, submissions are pushed to: When checked, submissions are pushed to HubSpot as contacts or deals.
Display the form title at the top of the: Display the form title at the top of the public page.
Show a progress bar when the form has mu: Show a progress bar when the form has multiple pages.
Enable the AI-powered summary on the for: Enable the AI-powered summary on the form dashboard.
Attach a PDF version of the submission t: Attach a PDF version of the submission to the respondent confirmation email.
Text added before the submission number: Text added before the submission number (e.g. "INV-").
Text added after the submission number (: Text added after the submission number (e.g. "-A").
Authorization headers are injected autom: Authorization headers are injected automatically from your connection.
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
HEAD: HEAD
Triggers instantly when a new response i: Triggers instantly when a new response is submitted to a Deftform form.
\n**Setup instructions:**\n1. In your De:
**Setup instructions:**
1. In your Deftform workspace go to **Settings → Notifications / Connections**.
2. Under **Webhook**, click **ADD ENDPOINT** and paste the URL below:
```
{{webhookUrl}}
```
3. Save the endpoint, then open the form you want to watch, go to its **Notifications / Connections** tab, and enable the webhook you just created.
